creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
On Fri, 5 Jun 2009 20:30:12 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of www/webcheck,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/135300 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/135300

The software - not website - has a new maintainer. Since this isn't a
patch, but a complete port, the MAINTAINER should be changed to Jeremy
(if he's willing) and then used as is. As the current maintainer, I
have no objection to that.

Jeremy - as a port maintainer, you should submit patches, not
archives. That's what committers expect.

	  <mike
-- 
Mike Meyer <mwm@mired.org>		http://www.mired.org/consulting.html
Independent Network/Unix/Perforce consultant, email for more information.
